usage: create_interposer_route_block [-help] -cell <string> -dir <string> -inst <string> [{-box {x1 y1 x2 y2} | -polygon {x1 y1 x2 y2 ...} | -rects {{lx1 ly1 ux1 uy1} {lx2 ly2 ux2 uy2}...}}]

options.name: -box
options.description: specifies the master block's bounding box

options.name: -dir
options.description: specifies the directory name that will contain the partition information and files

options.name: -polygon
options.description: specifies the master block's corner coordinates {{x1 y1} {x2 y2}...}

options.name: -rects
options.description: {{lx1 ly1 ux1 uy1} {lx2 ly2 ux2 uy2}...} specifies the master block's box list {{lx1 ly1 ux1 uy1} {lx2 ly2 ux2 uy2}...}
